content:
This is an English article for testing multilingual support.
Overview This article verifies that the Hugo multilingual configuration is correct and that i18n translations work properly.
Test Points English content renders correctly Menu uses i18n to display English names Page title and description switch by language Archive and search page content is in column 2 Code Example def hello(): print("Hello, World!")
summary:
This is an English article for testing multilingual support.

Overview

This article verifies that the Hugo multilingual configuration is correct and that i18n translations work properly.

Test Points

  1. English content renders correctly
  2. Menu uses i18n to display English names
  3. Page title and description switch by language
  4. Archive and search page content is in column 2

Code Example

def hello():
    print("Hello, World!")
title: Hello World - Test Article

From zero to hero, one line at a time.
